meta.title: Doctore.ar | Enterprise Digital Health Solutions
meta.description: Comprehensive medical management platform for healthcare institutions. Security, scalability, and trust guaranteed.

hero.title: Trust and Technology for
hero.description: Enterprise medical management solutions that combine corporate strength with the warmth of healthcare. Bank-level security and dedicated 24/7 support.

turnos.title: TurnosMedicos Enterprise
turnos.subtitle: Market-leading appointment management system, designed for high-complexity healthcare institutions and corporate medical networks.

features.title: Centralized Management
features.description: Unified panel to coordinate multiple locations, specialties, and professionals from a single interface.

features.title: Full Integration
features.description: Robust APIs to integrate with HIS, ERP, billing, and insurance systems seamlessly.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Data encryption, HIPAA compliance, complete audit trails, and granular access control.

features.title: Advanced Reporting
features.description: Real-time analytics, customizable KPIs, and multi-format export for decision making.

services.subtitle: COMPREHENSIVE SOLUTIONS
services.title: Services Designed to Scale
services.description: We offer a complete suite of digital tools that adapt to your organization's needs.

items.title: Digital Medical Records
items.description: Electronic medical records system with full interoperability and secure access from any device.

items.title: Corporate Telemedicine
items.description: Virtual consultation platform with recording, e-prescriptions, and virtual waiting room management.

items.title: Resource Management
items.description: Comprehensive control of staff, medical equipment, offices, and hospital resources in real time.

items.title: Automated Billing
items.description: Billing system integrated with insurance companies, prepaid plans, and AFIP electronic invoicing.

items.title: Business Intelligence
items.description: Executive dashboards with key metrics, AI-based predictions, and customizable alerts.

items.title: Enterprise Integration
items.description: We connect your existing technology ecosystem through REST APIs, webhooks, and native connectors.

pricing.subtitle: CORPORATE PLANS
pricing.title: Clear Investment, Guaranteed Return
pricing.description: Flexible plans adapted to your organization's size and needs.

about.subtitle: ABOUT US
about.title: Transforming Digital Health in Argentina
about.description: Since 2018, we help healthcare institutions digitize their operations with robust, secure, and scalable solutions. Our team combines technology and healthcare expertise to create tools that really work.

values.title: Security First
values.text: We comply with the highest international standards for healthcare data security and privacy.

values.title: Constant Innovation
values.text: We continuously research and develop to stay at the forefront of technology.

values.title: Dedicated Support
values.text: Specialized technical team available 24/7 to ensure operational continuity.

values.title: Scalability
values.text: Architecture designed to grow with your organization without compromising performance.

contact.subtitle: CONTACT
contact.title: Let's Talk About Your Project
contact.description: Fill out the form and a specialist will contact you within 24 business hours.

footer.description: Enterprise digital health solutions for institutions seeking operational excellence and regulatory compliance.
